hooks.command: jq -e '.stop_hook_active == true' >/dev/null && exit 0; [ -n "$(git -C "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-.}" status --porcelain 2>/dev/null)" ] && jq -n '{decision: "block", reason: "The working tree has uncommitted changes. Commit your work before finishing (branch first if on a detached HEAD). If something must stay uncommitted, tell the user why."}'; exit 0
